forecast.name: Overnight
forecast.detailedForecast: A slight chance of rain showers. Mostly cloudy, with a low around 55. West southwest wind around 9 mph. Chance of precipitation is 20%.

forecast.name: Sunday
forecast.shortForecast: Slight Chance Rain Showers then Partly Sunny
forecast.detailedForecast: A slight chance of rain showers before noon. Partly sunny. High near 64, with temperatures falling to around 62 in the afternoon. West southwest wind 7 to 14 mph, with gusts as high as 18 mph. Chance of precipitation is 20%.

weather_report:
In Downtown San Francisco, the night whispers into the early hours with a subtle chance of rain, the air laden with the promise of moisture. As you glance towards the horizon, the city emerges through a veil of clouds, the murmur of the west-southwest wind weaving its way through streets that carry the echoes of a vibrant day. The temperature hovers gently around a mild 55 degrees, inviting the warmth of a light jacket, especially as the coolness cradles the early morning.

As the sun stretches towards its zenith, expect a day painted in shades of uncertainty—scattered showers may flirt with your plans before noon, yet the clouds will gradually yield, allowing rays of sunlight to dance upon city streets. The high will flirt with 64 before settling into a more comfortable embrace of 62, as the gentle breeze sways branches and stirs the leaves of nearby parks. With a 20% chance of rain lingering like an uninvited guest, one may find it wise to carry an umbrella, if only as a precaution. 

The presence of fog may touch the outer edges, hinting at the marine layer’s caress on the Golden Gate, while the heart of the city remains clear, encouraging strolls along the Embarcadero or explorations of hidden cafes that evoke warmth and comfort. Perhaps, amidst the uncertain skies, a leisurely brunch could captivate your morning, or an afternoon jaunt through Golden Gate Park to inhale the city's rhythm as it awakens can soothe the spirit. Whatever your choice, let the elements guide your journey through this jewel of the Bay.
